use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons on landing pages or marketing sites
Interactive form submission triggers with visual feedback
Navigation action buttons requiring attention-grabbing styling
Dashboard or app interface buttons needing modern aesthetics
Hero section CTA buttons with animated gradient effects
ai_summary: A premium shiny gradient button component featuring a dynamic blue-cyan animated background that shifts on hover, enhanced with glow effects and inset shadows for dimensional depth. The button includes smooth 700ms transitions, focus ring accessibility support, and a responsive design that scales across desktop and mobile platforms. Ideal for call-to-action buttons, form submissions, and interactive UI elements requiring a modern, eye-catching appearance.
